hero.title: Professional ESG reports. Fully automated.
hero.subtitle: The first platform that takes your data from zero to finished report. No consulting, no spreadsheets, no months of waiting.

home.howItWorksTitle: From raw data to finished reports
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to transform your ESG data into actionable insights.
home.step1Desc: Upload PDFs, spreadsheets, or enter data manually. We accept all common ESG formats.
home.step2Desc: Automatic extraction, classification, and mapping to GRI, SASB, TCFD, and other frameworks.
home.step3Desc: Audit-ready reports, score monitoring, and improvement identification.
home.whyTitle: Built for ESG teams that take compliance seriously
home.multiFrameworkDesc: GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, ISSB — all automatically mapped from a single dataset.
home.securityDesc: SOC 2 compliant, data encrypted at rest and in transit, granular access controls.
home.teamDesc: Roles and permissions per company, complete audit trails, approval workflows.
home.multiCompanyDesc: Manage ESG for your entire corporate group from a single centralized platform.

features.title: Everything you need for ESG management
features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed to streamline your sustainability reporting and compliance workflows.

ai.title: AI-Powered Extraction
ai.desc: Automatically extract and classify ESG data points from corporate documents using advanced natural language processing models.

frameworks.title: Multi-Framework Support
frameworks.desc: Seamlessly report across GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, CSRD, and other major ESG frameworks from a single platform.

scoring.title: Real-time ESG Scoring
scoring.desc: Receive continuous, data-driven ESG scores with transparent methodology and granular environmental, social, and governance breakdowns.

reports.title: Audit-Ready Reports
reports.desc: Generate professional, regulation-compliant reports ready for external auditors, investors, and regulatory bodies.

dashboard.title: Interactive Dashboards
dashboard.desc: Visualize performance trends, benchmark against industry peers, and monitor progress toward sustainability targets in real time.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Protect sensitive corporate data with end-to-end encryption, role-based access controls, and full SOC 2 compliance.

cta.title: Ready to transform your ESG reporting?
cta.subtitle: Join leading organizations that trust ESGenius to streamline their sustainability strategy and regulatory compliance.

footer.desc: AI-powered ESG management platform for data extraction, scoring, and regulatory reporting.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization. No hidden fees, no surprises.

professional.name: Professional
professional.desc: Ideal for mid-sized companies beginning their ESG reporting journey.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For large organizations requiring comprehensive ESG management and dedicated support.
enterprise.feature3: All frameworks (GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, CSRD)
